headline: Morgan Stanley sees risks for SAP stock into Q1 earnings
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley cut its price target on SAP ahead of the German software company’s first-quarter earnings, flagging geopolitical risks and lengthening deal cycles that could weigh on its cloud growth.

headline: Morgan Stanley and Bank of American Wealth Units Bring in Billions of New Money
summary: Bank of America’s wealth unit, which includes a private bank and Merrill, reported asset flows of $20 billion for the quarter.  For the year-ago period, Morgan Stanley hauled in $93.8 billion.  Managing money on behalf of affluent investors has become a big business for banks, which prize the steady revenues wealth management can generate.

headline: Morgan Stanley’s (NYSE:MS) Q1 CY2026: Strong Sales
summary: Global financial services firm Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 16% year on year to $20.58 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.43 per share was 13.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Morgan Stanley’s (NYSE:MS) Q1 CY2026: Strong Sales
content.summary: Global financial services firm Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 16% year on year to $20.58 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.43 per share was 13.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Morgan Stanley Investment Banking, Wealth Management Deliver Record Quarter
summary: Morgan Stanley said its institutional securities and wealth management units delivered record net revenue for the first quarter of $10.7 billion and $8.5 billion, respectively.  Morgan Stanley reported net new assets of $118 billion for the quarter, up from $93.8 billion for the same period last year.  Daily average revenue trades, a brokerage industry metric for investor activity, were 1.1 million for the quarter compared to 1 million for the year-ago period.

content.title: Morgan Stanley Investment Banking, Wealth Management Deliver Record Quarter
content.summary: Morgan Stanley said its institutional securities and wealth management units delivered record net revenue for the first quarter of $10.7 billion and $8.5 billion, respectively.  Morgan Stanley reported net new assets of $118 billion for the quarter, up from $93.8 billion for the same period last year.  Daily average revenue trades, a brokerage industry metric for investor activity, were 1.1 million for the quarter compared to 1 million for the year-ago period.

headline: Morgan Stanley Earnings Beat Estimates. The Stock Is Rising.
summary: Morgan Stanley reported first-quarter earnings per share of $3.43, handily beating Wall Street estimates of $3.02.  In the latest first quarter, Morgan Stanley benefited from strong performances by its investment banking and wealth management units.  Shares of Morgan Stanley were up 1.2% in premarket trading.

headline: Morgan Stanley Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
summary: NEW YORK, April 15, 2026--Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) today announced its first quarter 2026 financial results. The results are now available on the Firm’s Investor Relations website at www.morganstanley.com/about-us-ir/earnings-releases. The results will be filed on a Form 8-K with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on April 15, 2026, which will be available on the SEC’s website at www.sec.gov.

content.title: Morgan Stanley Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
content.summary: NEW YORK, April 15, 2026--Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) today announced its first quarter 2026 financial results. The results are now available on the Firm’s Investor Relations website at www.morganstanley.com/about-us-ir/earnings-releases. The results will be filed on a Form 8-K with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on April 15, 2026, which will be available on the SEC’s website at www.sec.gov.

headline: Hedge Funds Pivot to Bearish Dollar Bets on US-Iran Talks Optimism
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Hedge funds are increasingly downbeat on the dollar as the prospect of renewed US-Iran talks and a possible peace deal sap the currency’s war-driven strength. Investors added to their bearish dollar trades this month through April 10, based on a proprietary trading model from Morgan Stanley.In the options market, so-called risk reversals on the Bloomberg dollar index show the premium to hedge against a stronger dollar compared with bets against a weaker greenback has narrowed this

headline: Pimco Buys All $400 Million of Bonds Sold by Blue Owl BDC
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Pacific Investment Management Co. bought all $400 million of bonds issued Monday by a Blue Owl Capital Inc. private credit fund, according to people with knowledge of the matter.The purchase comes amid a selloff that’s pushed spreads on notes from similar funds to multiyear highs in recent weeks, fueled in part by concerns over lending standards and exposure to software companies vulnerable to disruption from AI. Whether Pimco intends to hold onto the bonds is an open question, wi

headline: Tax Day, bank earnings, US stocks near records: Today's top themes
summary: Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland takes a closer look at the events that Wall Street is watching closely on Wednesday, including the national deadline for American taxpayers, earnings from major banks Morgan Stanley (MS) and Bank of America (BAC), and stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) reapproaching record highs amid renewed negotiations between the US and Iran.

headline: US Stocks Hover Near All-Time High on Peace Hopes: Markets Wrap
summary: (Bloomberg) -- US stocks were near a record high following a rally powered by optimism around a potential peace deal in the Middle East, with traders now eyeing confirmation of new talks and a fresh spate of corporate earnings.The S&P 500 was up 0.1%, after the benchmark closed within a whisker of its late-January high in the previous session.
